title: An Act respecting National Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma Awareness Day
shortTitle: National Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma Awareness Day Act
fullText: S-244 1 45 3-4 Charles III 2025 An Act respecting National Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma Awareness Day National Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma Awareness Day Act National Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma Awareness Day Act 2025 12 10 Senator MARTIN 4512227 SUMMARY This enactment designates the 17th day of May in each and every year as “National Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma Awareness Day”. Preamble Whereas diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma is an aggressive brain tumour that attacks the brainstem and slowly destroys all vital functions even as cognitive functions remain intact, rendering the affected person a prisoner in their own body; Whereas diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma typically affects children who are five to seven years of age; Whereas diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma remains inoperable , incurable and fatal; Whereas the prognosis and treatments have not improved in more than 40 years; Whereas the Parliament of Canada wishes to increase awareness of this disease among Canadians in order to encourage public and private investment in research to improve the prognosis and treatments; Whereas it is important to honour those who have died of this disease; And whereas the 17th day of May of each year is recognized in a number of other countries as a diffuse intrinsic pontine glioma awareness day; His Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows: Short title 1 This Act may be cited as the National Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma Awareness Day Act . National Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma Awareness Day 2 Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the 17th day of May is to be known as “National Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma Awareness Day”.
